timer.wrappingUp: wrapping up · eyes ready for a break
timer.greetAfternoon: good afternoon · go easy on the eyes

alerts.title: Time for a quick break
alerts.body: You've been focused for {{streak}} — let your eyes rest.
alerts.lightBody: You've been at it for {{streak}} — look up and away for a moment.

lookAway.title: Look 20 feet away
lookAway.description: Pick a distant object — soften your gaze for 20 seconds.

rolls.title: Eye rolls
rolls.description: Roll your eyes slowly clockwise, then counter-clockwise.

squeeze.title: Squeeze & release
squeeze.description: Close your eyes firmly for 3 seconds, then open wide.

blink.title: Refresh blinks
blink.description: Blink rapidly for 10 seconds to refresh tear film.

figure8.title: Figure-eight
figure8.description: Trace a slow figure-8 with your gaze.

rows.testAlertHint: Fire one now at the selected level
rows.smartSnoozeHint: Skip alert if a video / game is playing
rows.footprintHint: Record which apps you spend time in
rows.purgeHint: Wipes app footprint and break history
rows.showOnboardingHint: Re-displays on the next timer-page visit
rows.categoryEmpty: No app footprint yet — come back after a while
rows.autoDndMeetingsHint: Suppress alerts when Zoom / Teams / WeChat / Lark / DingTalk etc. is foreground
rows.autoDndGamesHint: Suppress alerts in fullscreen apps + known game launchers

actions.purgeConfirm: Permanently delete all app footprint and break history? This cannot be undone.

stats.hourlyEmpty: no data for today yet — check back in a few minutes
stats.noAppData: no app data yet — keep working

pomodoro.title: Pomodoro mode
pomodoro.hintOff: Replace free timer with focus cycles

follow.drinkBody: Grab a sip of water — your eyes will thank you.
follow.postureBody: Sit tall, drop your shoulders, and adjust your screen distance.

celebrate.cycleBody: You closed out a full pomodoro cycle — your eyes thank you.
celebrate.milestone5Body: You're keeping up. Eyes notice this.

onboarding.tagline: A desktop-grade eye-care companion — quiet, visible, memorable.
onboarding.tierTitle: Three alert tiers — pick what suits the moment
onboarding.tierLight: Light · a small pill slides in at the screen corner, never interrupts
onboarding.tierMedium: Medium · bottom-right card with Start break / Later actions
onboarding.tierHard: Hard · fullscreen rest screen with a countdown
onboarding.trayHint: Closing the main window minimises to tray. Right-click the icon for quick actions.

common.dndHint: When any of these apps is in the foreground, EyeGuard skips its alert (usage is still tracked).
